## What does this PR do?

<!-- Describe the change and the problem it solves. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Update to an existing skill
- [ ] Docs / governance
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] A new/changed skill has valid `SKILL.md` YAML frontmatter (`name`, `description`).
- [ ] The `description` says **when to use** the skill (it stays resident in context).
- [ ] At least one worked example is in the skill body.
- [ ] Dependencies are from the curated/pinned set (no "install anything" guidance).
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or customer data (this repo is **public**).
- [ ] I have the right to contribute this under [Apache-2.0](../LICENSE) (DCO).
